friends.name: Reuben A
friends.secretQuestion: What book did i get you?
friends.Hint: Lord of the rings : the what?
friends.message: Reuben, You've been such a great friend to me and the only one left from cement fuckers. It means alot that you stuck with me and always had my back. I really hope you succeed in life and i know one day ill be watching a big film you've worked on. Thanks for being there for me and being such a great friend.

friends.name: Connor K
friends.secretQuestion: What Band do we have jumpers of?
friends.message: Conor, You are probably my best friend, playing games with you over the past year especially has helped me so much. I cant wait to live with you in london, I know it'll be a blast. I still remember when we used to listen to music when we all used to hang out at the lake. I Hope you know how great of a friend you are and how i much i appreciate you!!

friends.name: Jess P
friends.secretQuestion: What School year did we meet?
friends.message: Jess, You are one of my oldest friends and im so happy that you still wanna be friends with me. You've been such a great friend to have all these years and helped me so much. Who would have known that when we became friends back in Leigh beck, the impact you would have on my life still to this day, You are probably one of the smartest and caring people i know and i know you are gonna succeed in life continuing to help others. Thank you for being there all this time and i hope we can still friends for many more years to come!

friends.name: Cameron B
friends.secretQuestion: What School year did we meet?
friends.message: Cameron, You are the longest friend i have and Im so happy that you're still my friend. I know we dont talk as much as we used to but i still consider you one of my closest friends and im so grateful for everything you've helped me get trough. You are so smart and so kind and you're gonna do so well in life no matter what. I hope we can still be friends for many more years to come.

friends.name: Cameron S
friends.secretQuestion: What was the first game we played together?
friends.Hint: Its a toxic game i have since quit
friends.message: Cameron, Even though we have been friends for long, i consider you one of my closets friends and im so grateful for everything you've helped me with over the past year. Playing games with you and letting me join your friends group online really helped me when it felt like i had no one. You have no idea how much that meant to me and i hope you know how much i appreciate you. I hope we are still friends long after Uni and we do that yearly tradition you want. I know you're gonna do so well in life and i hope your business takes off. Thanks for being such a great friend.

friends.name: Sam S
friends.secretQuestion: What was the Genre of music do we both enjoy?
friends.message: Sam, you are one of the best friends ive made at uni and have helped me so much, if it was helping me with uni work or just being there to talk to when i needed it, you have always been there for me and i really appreciate that. I hope we can still be friends for many more years to come and i know you're gonna do so well in life. Thanks for being such a great friend.

friends.name: Deer
friends.secretQuestion: What is my pet name for you?
friends.message: Hiii Pumpkin! You are an amazing partner and i love you so much! I hope we can continue to make memories together and you know ill always be there for you. You are gorgeous even if you smell a bit hehe jk.
